🚀 Skills + Social + Marketplace — All in One

Find Trusted Experts
Buy · Sell · Connect

The safe, social marketplace connecting you with police-verified professionals, local deals, and vibrant communities.

Everything You Need, One Platform

🛡️

Police Verified

Every worker with a green badge has passed police background clearance.

💰

Escrow Payments

Money held securely until job is done. Only 1% fee — 99% goes to worker.

📱

QR Safety Scan

Scan worker QR code in person to verify identity and safety profile.

🏪

Social Marketplace

Buy, sell, and trade locally — from vehicles to electronics, all in one place.

👥

Communities

Join skill groups, local communities, and professional networks.

🤖

AI Assistant

Built-in chatbot helps find pros, get estimates, and manage bookings.
